evals.input: I need SEO help for my SaaS
evals.notes: Direct SEO help request — the gatekeeper should trigger
SEO audit request — seo-context is the entry point (it triages, then routes)

evals.input: Why am I not ranking on Google?
evals.notes: Ranking problem, unknown cause — gather context and triage before diagnosing
Strategy request — context first; seo-strategy runs after the research

evals.input: How do I get more traffic?
evals.notes: Vague traffic ask — should trigger and challenge it with the revenue-first reframe

evals.input: We want to rank #1 for 'project management software'
evals.notes: Head-term ambition — reality-check DA/feasibility before keyword-research

evals.input: My site is slow. Is that hurting my SEO?
evals.notes: Diagnostic 'is this hurting me?' with unknown cause — assess and route to technical-seo-audit
Specific keyword task — routes to the specialist, NOT the gatekeeper
Specific on-page fix — routes to the specialist, NOT the gatekeeper

evals.input: Why isn't ChatGPT or Perplexity citing my site?
evals.notes: Specific AI-visibility question — routes to the specialist, NOT the gatekeeper
